graded_findings.rationale: The gather found this new design spec accurately describes the added dscli logs command and related behavior. This is appropriate supporting documentation, not a merge-blocking gap.
The implementation plan is reported to match the changed files and verification path. It is useful evidence of planning coherence, but does not indicate a blocking issue.
A new user-facing dscli subcommand is missing from the existing dscli command reference. That leaves operators without documented usage and options for the new CLI surface, so it should block merge.
